name: yang-kura-audio-library-ui-prototype

scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build && npm run build:electron && npm run patch:electron-builder && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win portable nsis --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run build && npm run build:electron && npm run patch:electron-builder && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win portable --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.desktop:prepare-validation-bundle: npm run build && npm run build:electron && node scripts/prepare-desktop-validation-bundle.mjs
scripts.desktop:preview: npm run build && npm run build:electron && node scripts/run-electron-preview.mjs
scripts.desktop:validate-chain: npm run verify:env && npm run lint && npm run build:electron && npm run verify:all && npm run build

description: Yang-Kura Windows local audio media library Beta: ASMR/RJ and music library, Local JSON Index, HTMLAudio/mpv fallback, subtitles, transactional importer, portable and NSIS.
mvp28DesktopValidation: 0.66.2-mvp28.2 keeps the MVP-28.1 desktop flow and adds stable Electron userData/session/cache/logs/crashDumps paths; no installer dependency is added.
mvp29WindowsPackaging: 0.67.0-mvp29 adds electron-builder 26.15.3 portable and NSIS packaging scripts/config plus a postinstall compatibility patch for @noble/hashes CJS blockmap loading.
mvp30Onboarding: 0.68.0-mvp30 streamlines packaged first-use flow: choose root, read existing index, or one-click scan/write/read/apply without touching media files.
mvp31PlaybackHistory: 0.69.0-mvp31 adds persisted recent playback history, continue-playing mapping to current index tracks, and resume progress for HTMLAudio/local tracks.
mvp32LibrarySession: 0.70.0-mvp32 stores last library/index session metadata, improves startup/resource-library status guidance, and reminds packaged users to reselect directories before reading an existing index.
mvp33LibraryBrowseFilters: 0.71.0-mvp33 adds source/subtitle/playback filters for ASMR browsing, real playback-history sorting, subtitle/playback badges, and scoped cleanup of misleading ASMR demo wording.
mvp34PlayerExperience: 0.72.0-mvp34 adds player experience polish, user-facing end-of-play behavior modes, less demo/engineering wording in player surfaces, and documentation/verifier coverage.
mvp35QueuePersistence: 0.73.0-mvp35 persists the player queue, current queue index, progress, loop mode, volume/mute state, and playback completion strategy without storing mediaUrl, resolvedMediaUrl, file URLs, or absolute paths.
mvp36PlaylistPersistence: 0.74.0-mvp36 persists user-created and modified playlists under yang_kura_user_playlists_v1, separates system demo playlists from local user playlists, and sanitizes playlist tracks without storing mediaUrl, file URLs, or absolute paths.
mvp37LocalCoverArtwork: 0.75.0-mvp37 maps local index cover relative paths to yang-kura-media://cover tokenized URLs, adds generated fallback cover artwork, and uses safe CoverArtwork rendering in main media surfaces without exposing absolute paths or file URLs.
mvp38UiCopyCleanup: 0.76.0-mvp38 reduces user-facing demo/engineering wording in primary surfaces, keeps technical detail in Diagnostics, and keeps downloader as Coming Soon without real network/file/database behavior.
mvp39MediaLibraryPolish: 0.77.0-mvp39 adds a dashboard media-library overview, folds advanced scanner/index tools behind a Settings disclosure, and continues moving engineering vocabulary away from daily user surfaces.
mvp40MediaSurfaceConsistency: 0.78.0-mvp40 adds unified music/playlist overview cards and source/status badges via mediaSurfaceStatusService, continuing media-library polish without adding SQLite, downloader, metadata scraping, mpv, or file mutation.
mvp41PlayerSurfacePolish: 0.79.0-mvp41 adds player detail/lyrics surface polish, user-facing player state chips and stats, less engineering/demo wording in listening surfaces, and keeps backend/file safety unchanged.
mvp42DailyListeningSurface: 0.80.0-mvp42 adds daily listening Dashboard cards, queue drawer summaries, track badges, and keeps backend/file safety unchanged.
mvp43CollectionEmptyStates: 0.81.0-mvp43 adds collection/detail navigation summaries and empty states for ASMR details, music library filters, and playlists without adding SQLite, downloader, metadata scraping, mpv, or file mutation.
mvp44SettingsDiagnosticsSeparation: 0.82.0-mvp44 separates daily Settings actions from advanced resource tools and Diagnostics, adds user-facing guidance blocks, and keeps backend/file safety unchanged.
mvp45HomeRecentListening: 0.83.0-mvp45 strengthens the home, recent playback, and continue-listening surfaces, keeps UI Chinese and media-first, and does not change backend/file safety scope.
mvp46LibraryBrowseCleanup: 0.84.0-mvp46 cleans and unifies ASMR/music browsing surfaces, adds shared libraryBrowseSurfaceService models, lowers tool-like wording in library pages, and keeps backend/file safety unchanged.
mvp47PackagedRegression: 0.85.0-mvp47 adds packaged-app regression validation surfaces, updates the advisory desktop smoke checklist, cleans risky diagnostics demo wording, and keeps backend/file safety unchanged.
mvp48BetaCloseout: 0.86.0-mvp48 fixes the current milestone as personal-use Beta 0.1, adds betaCloseoutService and Diagnostics closeout guidance, and keeps SQLite/downloader/metadata/mpv/file mutation postponed.
mvp49ListeningPolish: 0.87.0-mvp49 polishes the home listening entry and bottom player status strip through listeningExperiencePolishService, keeps UI Chinese/media-first, and does not change scanner, index, playback, lyrics, packaging, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, or file mutation scope.
mvp50PlayerVisualPolish: 0.88.0-mvp50 adds player visual polish, full-player status rail, bottom player progress context, and clearer subtitle empty states without changing scanner, index, playback, lyrics, packaging, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, or file mutation scope.
mvp51PlayerImmersionPolish: 0.89.0-mvp51 adds full-player immersion polish, a listening focus rail, clearer lyrics empty state, and diagnostics coverage without changing scanner, index, playback, lyrics, packaging, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, or file mutation scope.
mvp53LibraryVisualUnity: 0.91.0-mvp53 unifies ASMR, music, and playlist browse surfaces through libraryVisualUnityService, keeps UI Chinese/media-first, and does not change scanner, index, playback, lyrics, packaging, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, or file mutation scope.
mvp54BetaRegressionChecklist: 0.92.0-mvp54 adds a Beta 0.1 manual regression checklist and small Settings/Home/PlayerBar/Diagnostics cleanup without changing scanner, index, playback, lyrics, packaging, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, or file mutation scope.
mvp55ComponentHealthReview: 0.93.0-mvp55 adds component health review, low-risk structure cleanup planning, Settings/About maintenance summary, and Diagnostics component review without changing scanner, index, playback, lyrics, packaging, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, or file mutation scope.
mvp57AsmrDetailSurface: 0.95.0-mvp57 extracts ASMR detail summary and track-state models into asmrDetailSurfaceService, softens resource-record wording, adds Diagnostics coverage, and does not change scanner, index, playback, lyrics, packaging, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, or file mutation scope.
mvp58SettingsPersonalWorkflow: 0.96.0-mvp58 polishes Settings/About for personal local use, privacy copy, and keeps advanced tools folded without changing scanner, index, playback, lyrics, packaging, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, or file mutation scope.
mvp59HomePlayerBetaPolish: 0.98.0-mvp60 polishes the home and player beta surfaces, compresses bottom-player status, unifies lyrics page wording, and does not change scanner, index, playback, lyrics, packaging, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, or file mutation scope.
mvp60BetaCandidateCloseout: 0.98.0-mvp60 finalizes the personal-use Beta 0.1 candidate package, documents current capability boundaries, adds betaCandidateCloseoutService, and keeps SQLite/downloader/metadata/mpv/file mutation postponed.
mvp65DiagnosticsMapGuard: 0.103.0-mvp65 fixes the DiagnosticsPage undefined.map runtime failure by wrapping fragile diagnostic arrays with toArray guards while keeping real media, scanner, index, playback, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, and file mutation scope unchanged.
mvp66BetaGuiRegression: 0.104.0-mvp66 fixes Beta 0.1 GUI full-chain regression confirmation, real small-sample checklist, diagnostics success criteria, and keeps SQLite/downloader/metadata/mpv/file mutation postponed.
mvp74PlayerbarHomeCleanup: 0.112.0-mvp74 cleans the bottom player bar and home daily entry surface, hides duplicated engineering/status blocks behind verifier markers, and keeps scanner/index/playback/file safety unchanged.

yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp75DiagnosticsHistoryFold: 0.113.0-mvp75 folds Diagnostics MVP history by phase, fixes bottom-player progress-bar stability, and keeps scanner/index/playback/file safety unchanged.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp77PackagedRegressionReview: 0.115.0-mvp77 adds packaged regression review, UI layout checklist, and DeepSeek/Codex cross-check prompt without changing scanner/index/playback/file safety.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp78PlayerPanelLayoutReview: 0.116.0-mvp78 reviews full player / lyrics panel narrow-window layout, clamps full-player progress display, records DeepSeek MVP-77 PASS, and keeps scanner/index/playback/file safety unchanged.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp79PlayerUiBugfix: 0.117.0-mvp79 fixes invalid Tailwind utility classes, PlayerBar click scope and More button feedback, LRC fractional-second parsing, sleep-dim clock refresh, and cover background guards without changing scanner/index/playback/file safety.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp80SettingsDiagnosticsDailyFinalize: Settings/Diagnostics daily finalization: user-facing settings and daily diagnostics stay visible, engineering terms and MVP history remain folded; no scanner/index/playback/file safety changes.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp81OfflineDemoCoverCleanup: 0.119.0-mvp81 removes remote Unsplash demo covers from src and uses generated local SVG data-url covers without changing scanner/index/playback/file safety.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp82UiBugSweep: 0.120.0-mvp82 applies DeepSeek UI bug-sweep fixes for residual invalid Tailwind utilities, modal animation, and duration display guards without changing scanner/index/playback/file safety.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp83BetaCloseoutPushPrep: 0.121.0-mvp83 records Beta 0.1 closeout and GitHub push preparation for company-network limitations without changing scanner/index/playback/file safety.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp84ImportDownloadStrategy: 0.122.0-mvp84 absorbs the master planning discussion: importer first, controlled copy/move with preview/logs, self-owned downloader ecosystem later, metadata source merge, mpv 子进程后端 as long-term route, and records that standard git push is blocked by current DNS/network.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp85ImportDownloadModels: 0.123.0-mvp85 freezes ImportTask / DownloadTask / DownloadManifest / MetadataSource model contracts without implementing real import/download/file operations.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp88MusicImportReadonlyDetection: 0.126.0-mvp88 adds music album / singles read-only import detection using tokenized relativePaths, no ID3/FLAC tag reading, no protected-format conversion, and no file operations.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp89ImportConflictDetection: 0.127.0-mvp89 adds import conflict detection preview for duplicate RJ, duplicate music album, same filename, target-exists, same-size suspect, and hash strategy without real hash calculation or file operations.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp93CopyOnlyMainSideStub: 0.131.0-mvp93 registers copy-only stub contract and blocked result; real file operations remain disabled.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp114LocalMetadataOverrides: 0.152.0-mvp114 adds versioned local metadata overrides for ASMR works, keeps edits across library-index reloads, reuses the existing detail editor, and does not modify audio tags, connect to providers, expose absolute paths, or add SQLite.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp117SingleRjProviderPreview: 0.155.0-mvp117 closes the local metadata foundation and adds a provider-neutral single-RJ JSON difference preview that only fills the edit draft after user review; no network, automatic overwrite, media tag write, SQLite, absolutePath, or file://.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp119ProviderCacheThrottle: 0.157.0-mvp119 adds a 10-minute Electron-memory cache, 5-second same-RJ request throttle, explicit refresh, cache clear, query timestamp display, and manual JSON fallback without automatic metadata writes or media-file mutation.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp120DlsiteTotalDeadline: 0.158.0-mvp120 enforces one total timeout budget across all DLsite candidate URLs so a 12-second query cannot expand to six sequential 12-second attempts.
yangKuraMvpNotes.mvp122MpvBackendMinimal: 0.160.0-mvp122 adds Electron-main mpv subprocess playback with tokenized paths, play/pause/seek/stop/volume event sync, and HTMLAudio fallback without exposing absolutePath or file://.

mvp81OfflineDemoCoverCleanup: 0.119.0-mvp81 removes remote Unsplash demo covers from src and uses generated local SVG data-url covers without changing scanner/index/playback/file safety.
mvp84ImportDownloadStrategy: 0.122.0-mvp84 absorbs the master planning discussion: importer first, controlled copy/move with preview/logs, self-owned downloader ecosystem later, metadata source merge, mpv 子进程后端 as long-term route, and records that standard git push is blocked by current DNS/network.
mvp85ImportDownloadModels: 0.123.0-mvp85 freezes ImportTask / DownloadTask / DownloadManifest / MetadataSource model contracts, adds Codex push-ready instructions, and keeps importer/downloader/file operations implementation postponed.
mvp88MusicImportReadonlyDetection: 0.126.0-mvp88 adds music album / singles read-only import detection, folder-name artist/album inference, protected-format warnings, and ImportTask preview without real file operations.
mvp89ImportConflictDetection: 0.127.0-mvp89 adds import conflict detection preview and hash strategy contract without real file operations.
mvp92CopySampleReadiness: 0.130.0-mvp92 prepares copy-only minimal sample, Codex local validation taskbook, IPC contract, and main-side safety contract without executing real file copy.
mvp93CopyOnlyMainSideStub: 0.131.0-mvp93 adds copy-only main-side stub / preload methods / blocked result contract without executing real copy or exposing absolutePath/file://.
mvp101ImportUiRefreshAfterPatch: 0.139.0-mvp101 refreshes the renderer library after confirmed copy-only index patch writes by reading library-index.json, persisting the read result, dispatching yang-kura-library-index-loaded, and surfacing added/updated resource counts without SQLite/full scan/file mutation.
mvp102CopyOnlyImportCloseout: 0.140.0-mvp102 closes the copy-only import chain from MVP95 through MVP101, records a Codex minimal smoke-test prompt, and keeps SQLite/downloader/metadata/mpv/move-delete-rename/absolutePath/file:// out of scope.
mvp109UiEngineeringPanelCleanup: 0.147.0-mvp109 moves visible importer regression/maintenance panels behind the folded AI maintenance area, keeps primary surfaces media-first and Chinese, and does not change copy/move executors, index writes, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, absolutePath, or file:// boundaries.
mvp110GlobalDailyUiCleanup: 0.148.0-mvp110 keeps Dashboard, Settings, Downloader, and player-adjacent daily surfaces Chinese and user-facing; moves rootPathToken/dry-run/Renderer/provider/engine wording behind diagnostics or maintenance anchors without changing importer, scanner, index, playback, SQLite, downloader, metadata, mpv, absolutePath, or file:// boundaries.
mvp120DlsiteTotalDeadline: 0.158.0-mvp120 enforces one total timeout budget across all DLsite candidate URLs so a 12-second query cannot expand to six sequential 12-second attempts.
mvp123MpvSettingsDetection: 0.161.0-mvp123 adds main-side mpv executable selection, persisted private path configuration, installation/version detection, Settings status UI, HTMLAudio fallback visibility, and a read-only Windows sample validation command.
mvp125PlayerAcceptance: 0.163.0-mvp125 adds a read-only real-mpv acceptance command for progress restore, pause/seek, optional queue switching, and process cleanup without scanning libraries or exposing paths.
mvp126LargeLibraryPerformance: 0.164.0-mvp126 adds synthetic 50k-track benchmarks, deferred indexed search, bounded DOM rendering, route-level code splitting, and two-stage diagnostics loading without reading the real library.
